findings.body: The roadmap/context text has inconsistent counts for CodeRabbit findings: Expected next deliverable still says seven focused CodeRabbit findings while the active work enumeration now references two locally repaired findings.
findings.disposition: Locally repaired while recording the focused refresh result; provider refresh required after remaining open findings are repaired or dispositioned.

findings.body: collectTrustSignalRequirements filters out non-string entries silently; it should validate every policy.trust_signal_requirements entry is a string and throw a descriptive trust_signal_requirements error when malformed.
findings.disposition: Locally repaired by 23fd3e8d470c9afd7a7f51d7c6fef3046e60c931; provider refresh required before Local Qwen or aggregate Stage 4 review.

findings.body: buildCockpitTrustSignals uses a misleading parameter name paths even though the object also contains staleEvidence and evidenceArtifactExistence metadata.
findings.disposition: Locally repaired by 23fd3e8d470c9afd7a7f51d7c6fef3046e60c931; provider refresh required before Local Qwen or aggregate Stage 4 review.

findings.body: readGateMatrix/readGate/readLandingReadiness restat evidence artifacts even after evidenceArtifactExistence has already been computed.
findings.disposition: Locally repaired by 23fd3e8d470c9afd7a7f51d7c6fef3046e60c931; provider refresh required before Local Qwen or aggregate Stage 4 review.

findings.body: validateEvidenceFreshnessSlosPolicy duplicates policy read and ENOENT handling with readRequiredPolicy instead of sharing an optional policy read helper.
findings.disposition: Locally repaired by 23fd3e8d470c9afd7a7f51d7c6fef3046e60c931; provider refresh required before Local Qwen or aggregate Stage 4 review.

attempts.summary: CodeRabbit completed the focused BANDIT-056 Stage 3 delta review and returned two trivial open findings against focused session-context pathExists sequencing and review_subject_hash source_identity metadata.
Codex PM locally repaired both prior CodeRabbit findings. Provider evidence was intentionally stale until focused CodeRabbit refresh on the repaired source.

Focused CodeRabbit refresh completed on the repaired source and returned five open findings: one major stale-freshness trust-signal issue, three minor validation/template normalization issues, and one trivial cockpit-status helper extraction issue.

Codex PM locally repaired all five focused CodeRabbit findings with regression coverage and adjacent projection verification. Provider evidence is intentionally stale until focused CodeRabbit refresh runs on the repaired source.

Focused CodeRabbit refresh completed on the locally repaired source and returned two open findings: one minor audit-trail gap in the CodeRabbit provider-output history and one trivial duplicate helper cleanup in evidence freshness SLO validation.

Focused CodeRabbit refresh completed on the locally repaired source and returned five open findings: two minor findings covering stale context count wording and trust_signal_requirements validation, plus three trivial cleanup findings in cockpit-status/evidence-freshness helpers.

Codex PM locally repaired the four remaining focused CodeRabbit findings: strict trust_signal_requirements validation, clearer cockpit trust-signal dependency naming, gate/landing existence reuse, and shared optional Evidence SLO policy reading. Provider evidence is intentionally stale until focused CodeRabbit refresh runs on the repaired source.
